description: Create a tiddler named 'Kanban Dashboard' that displays a 3-column wikitext table functioning as a Kanban board for tasks tagged 'Task'. The board must track the 'kanban-status' field across 'To Do', 'In Progress', and 'Done' states. Each column header should dynamically display the count of tasks in that state, and each column body should list the titles of the corresponding tasks. Include interactive buttons to transition task statuses: 'Start' (To Do to In Progress), 'Complete' (In Progress to Done), 'Revert' (In Progress to To Do), and 'Reopen' (Done to To Do).
